para_trans: Regarding the announcement of the results of the Assistant Cell Officer Post-Initial Training Examination 2025.
Government Circular No: AIT 2024 / P.C. 41 / Vyapam
Madam Kama Marg, Martyr Rajguru Chowk,

Post-Income Training Examination for Assistant Room Officer in the Ministry Cadre, Assistant Room Officer in the Office of the Maharashtra Public Service Commission and Assistant Room Officer (Law) in the Department of Law and Justice, Govt. Held from 05 August to 08 August 2025 at Elphinstone College, Fort, Mumbai.
It had come. The result of this post-entry training examination is being declared as per the Annexure attached.
7 Schedule "B" - Results of Second Chance Candidates 7 Schedule "C" - Results of Third Chance and beyond.
7 Schedule "D" - Results of candidates whose prescribed opportunities have expired

2. Candidates who want to recalculate the marks obtained in the answer sheets in accordance with the result of the said examination shall apply for recalculation in accordance with Annexure "E" appended to this circular through the establishment of their Administrative Department. Submission to the General Administration Department / Division by July 03, 2026.
3. To make this Government Circular available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra www.maharashtra.gov.in.
